description: read_payment_score issues cudaMemcpyAsync followed by cudaStreamSynchronize before reading the host buffer; the other two readers do straight-line CPU copies and read immediately. Unifying onto a shared reader that drops the stream sync returns uninitialised memory on the checkout path.

findings.rationale: read_payment_score calls cudaStreamSynchronize between the async copy and the host read; the other two readers use a synchronous CPU copy with no sync. Extra-call shape — the sync is sequenced between the side-effecting memcpy and the return that dereferences h_out[0].
